step_rationale: Cardiac-specific isoenzyme marking cardiomyocyte necrosis and infarct size; anchor for myocardial injury endpoint.
mechanism: Creatine kinase-MB is released from necrotic cardiomyocytes, quantifying the extent of myocardial necrosis in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: The role of 5-HT7 receptors on isoproterenol-induced myocardial infarction in rats with high-fat diet exacerbated coronary endothelial dysfunction.

High-throughput targeted proteomics discovery approach and spontaneous reperfusion in ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.

Platelet collagen receptor glycoprotein VI as a possible novel indicator for the acute coronary syndrome.
